info.name: ScorePion API
info.description: Complete API collection for ScorePion - Coderbyte Assessment Management System

item.name: Assessments

request.description: Get all assessments from Coderbyte. Admins see all assessments (to assign to positions), recruiters see empty list.

item.description: Endpoints for managing assessments from Coderbyte (ADMIN only)

item.name: Positions

request.description:
Create a new open position with associated Coderbyte assessments and optional file attachment. Requires ADMIN role.

Form Data Parameters:
- data: JSON string containing position details (title, description, external, assessmentIds)
- file: Optional file attachment (e.g., job description PDF)

query.description: Filter to show only active positions

request.description: Get all positions. Set activeOnly=true to filter only active positions.
Get detailed information about a specific position including all assessments.

formdata.value:
{
  "title": "Senior Kotlin Developer (Updated)",
  "description": "Updated description for Kotlin developer position",
  "external": true,
  "assessmentIds": [
    "kotlin-dev-9ntxc1nuo-rdr47me",
    "kotlin-dev-nhn768qy4d",
    "technical-assessment-qz54bru"
  ],
  "deleteFile": false
}

request.description:
Update an existing position's title, description, external flag, assessments, and file attachment.

Form Data Parameters:
- data: JSON string containing updated position details with deleteFile flag (true to remove existing file)
- file: Optional new file attachment (only if replacing existing file)
Activate a position that was previously deactivated. Returns 200 OK with success message.
Deactivate a position (soft delete). The position won't be deleted but marked as inactive. Returns 200 OK with success message.

item.description: Endpoints for managing open positions (ADMIN only)

item.name: Candidates

request.description: Invite a candidate to all assessments associated with a position. Both ADMIN and RECRUITER roles can use this endpoint. The system will automatically send invitations for all assessments linked to the position and send a Google Chat notification.

item.description: Endpoints for managing candidates (ADMIN and RECRUITER)

item.name: Recruiters

request.description: Get all positions assigned to the current logged-in recruiter. RECRUITER role only.
Send an invitation to a recruiter with optional position assignments. Requires ADMIN role.
Get list of all recruiters with their position count.
Get detailed information about a specific recruiter including all assigned positions.
Activate or deactivate a recruiter account.

item.description: Endpoints for recruiters: view assigned positions (RECRUITER) and manage recruiter accounts (ADMIN)

item.name: Recruiter Positions

request.description: Synchronize recruiter's positions. This is a state replacement operation: send the complete list of positionIds the recruiter should have. Positions not in the list will be revoked, new ones will be granted. Empty array removes all positions.
Get all positions assigned to a specific recruiter.

item.description: Endpoints for managing position access for recruiters (ADMIN only)

request.description: Get all pending recruiter invitations.

item.name: Global Notification Recipients

request.description: Get the complete global recipients configuration including metadata (emails, description, updatedAt, updatedBy). Returns empty configuration if not initialized. Requires ADMIN role.
Get only the list of email addresses configured as global recipients. Returns { "emails": ["email1@example.com", "email2@example.com"] }. Requires ADMIN role.

Add a new email address to the global recipients list. These emails will receive notifications for all candidate invitations.

Validations:
- Email format must be valid
- Email must not already exist in the list

Returns:
- 200: Email added successfully with updated configuration
- 400: Invalid email format or email already exists
- 500: Internal server error

Requires ADMIN role.

Remove an email address from the global recipients list.

Returns:
- 200: Email removed successfully with updated configuration
- 404: Email not found in recipients list
- 500: Internal server error

Note: URL encode the email address if it contains special characters.

Requires ADMIN role.

Update an existing email address in the global recipients list. This replaces the old email with the new one while maintaining the position in the list.

Validations:
- New email format must be valid
- Old email must exist in the list
- New email must not already exist in the list (unless it's the same as old email)

Returns:
- 200: Email updated successfully with updated configuration
- 400: Invalid request (old email not found, new email invalid format, or new email already exists)
- 500: Internal server error

Requires ADMIN role.

item.description:
Endpoints for managing global notification recipients. Global recipients receive email notifications for all candidate invitations regardless of position or recruiter. Only ADMIN users can manage these settings.

⚠️ NOTE: Currently the email template for global recipient notifications is not implemented (see NotificationOrchestrator.kt:278-288). The emails are stored in the database but notifications are not being sent yet.

item.name: Webhook
[LEGACY] Coderbyte Webhook - Completed with Report Ready

request.description:
⚠️ LEGACY ENDPOINT (To be deprecated)

✅ Scenario 1: Assessment completed normally, report ready

The ideal scenario where:
- Candidate completed the assessment normally (time_expired=false)
- Report has been fully processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=true)

The webhook will:
1. Fetch the full report from Coderbyte API
2. Update the invitation record with results
3. Send email to recruiter with complete report
4. Send Google Chat notification with detailed results (internal channel always, external channel if workspace is 'External')

Test data: Real completed assessment by admin@example.com for Java/Kotlin- SQL- NoSQL- Async (Internal @ST)

item.name: [LEGACY] Coderbyte Webhook - Completed but Report Processing

request.description:
⚠️ LEGACY ENDPOINT (To be deprecated)

⏳ Scenario 2: Assessment completed normally, report still processing

When:
- Candidate completed the assessment normally (time_expired=false)
- Report is still being processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=false)

The webhook will:
1. Send email to recruiter notifying report is pending
2. Send Google Chat notification to internal channel only (no workspace information available)
3. Coderbyte will send another webhook later when report is ready

Note: This is a temporary state notification. Full results will be sent when Coderbyte sends another webhook with report_ready=true

item.name: [LEGACY] Coderbyte Webhook - Time Expired with Report Ready

request.description:
⚠️ LEGACY ENDPOINT (To be deprecated)

⏰ Scenario 3: Time limit expired, report ready

When:
- Assessment time limit was reached (time_expired=true)
- Report has been processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=true)

The webhook will:
1. Fetch the full report from Coderbyte API
2. Update the invitation record with results
3. Send email to recruiter with complete report and time expiration note
4. Send Google Chat notification with ⏰ icon indicating time expiration

Note: The report may show incomplete challenges or lower scores due to time expiration

item.name: [LEGACY] Coderbyte Webhook - Time Expired and Report Processing

request.description:
⚠️ LEGACY ENDPOINT (To be deprecated)

⏰⏳ Scenario 4: Time limit expired, report still processing

When:
- Assessment time limit was reached (time_expired=true)
- Report is still being processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=false)

The webhook will:
1. Send email to recruiter notifying time expiration and pending report
2. Send Google Chat notification to internal channel with time expiration warning
3. Coderbyte will send another webhook later when report is ready

Note: This is the worst-case scenario - time expired AND report not ready. Full results will be sent when Coderbyte sends another webhook with report_ready=true

item.name: [NEW] Assessment Completed - Completed with Report Ready

request.description:
🆕 NEW ENDPOINT (Preferred)

✅ Scenario 1: Assessment completed normally, report ready

This is the new preferred webhook endpoint for assessment completion events.

The ideal scenario where:
- Candidate completed the assessment normally (time_expired=false)
- Report has been fully processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=true)

The webhook will:
1. Fetch the full report from Coderbyte API
2. Update the invitation record with results
3. Send email to recruiter with complete report
4. Send Google Chat notification with detailed results (internal channel always, external channel if workspace is 'External')

Test data: Real completed assessment by admin@example.com for Java/Kotlin- SQL- NoSQL- Async (Internal @ST)

item.name: [NEW] Assessment Completed - Completed but Report Processing

request.description:
🆕 NEW ENDPOINT (Preferred)

⏳ Scenario 2: Assessment completed normally, report still processing

When:
- Candidate completed the assessment normally (time_expired=false)
- Report is still being processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=false)

The webhook will:
1. Send email to recruiter notifying report is pending
2. Send Google Chat notification to internal channel only (no workspace information available)
3. Coderbyte will send another webhook later when report is ready

Note: This is a temporary state notification. Full results will be sent when Coderbyte sends another webhook with report_ready=true

item.name: [NEW] Assessment Completed - Time Expired with Report Ready

request.description:
🆕 NEW ENDPOINT (Preferred)

⏰ Scenario 3: Time limit expired, report ready

When:
- Assessment time limit was reached (time_expired=true)
- Report has been processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=true)

The webhook will:
1. Fetch the full report from Coderbyte API
2. Update the invitation record with results
3. Send email to recruiter with complete report and time expiration note
4. Send Google Chat notification with ⏰ icon indicating time expiration

Note: The report may show incomplete challenges or lower scores due to time expiration

item.name: [NEW] Assessment Completed - Time Expired and Report Processing

request.description:
🆕 NEW ENDPOINT (Preferred)

⏰⏳ Scenario 4: Time limit expired, report still processing

When:
- Assessment time limit was reached (time_expired=true)
- Report is still being processed by Coderbyte (report_ready=false)

The webhook will:
1. Send email to recruiter notifying time expiration and pending report
2. Send Google Chat notification to internal channel with time expiration warning
3. Coderbyte will send another webhook later when report is ready

Note: This is the worst-case scenario - time expired AND report not ready. Full results will be sent when Coderbyte sends another webhook with report_ready=true

item.description:
Webhook endpoints for external integrations

NOTE: The collection includes both legacy (/webhook/coderbyte) and new (/webhook/coderbyte/assessment/completed) endpoints. The new endpoint is preferred and will be the only supported endpoint in the future.

item.name: Applicants

formdata.description: Optional — provide either this file or linkedinUrl in data

request.description:
Public endpoint for external candidates to submit their application. No authentication required.

Form Data Parameters:
- data (text/application/json): JSON with name, email, phone, positionId, linkedinUrl (optional), gdprConsent, captchaToken
- file (file, optional): CV/resume — required if linkedinUrl is not provided

Validations:
- Position must exist and be active
- Email format validation
- Phone format validation
- Name cannot be empty
- Must provide either file or linkedinUrl
- No duplicate applications (same email + position)

Returns:
- 200: Application submitted successfully
- 400: Invalid request (validation errors or duplicate application)
- 500: Internal server error

Update an existing applicant's information and file attachment. ADMIN only.

Form Data Parameters:
- data: JSON string containing updated applicant details with deleteFile flag (true to remove existing file)
- file: Optional new file attachment (only if replacing existing file)

Validations:
- Applicant must exist
- Email format validation (if email is being updated)
- Phone format validation (if phone is being updated)
- Cannot update positionId

Returns:
- 200: Applicant updated successfully
- 400: Invalid request (validation errors)
- 404: Applicant not found
- 500: Internal server error

Public endpoint to view available positions. No authentication required.

Returns:
- List of all active positions marked as external (external=true)
- Sorted by creation date (most recent first)
- Includes: id, title, description, createdAt

Used by external candidates to browse open job positions on the BTS website.

Public endpoint to view detailed information about a specific position. No authentication required.

Validations:
- Position must exist
- Position must be active (isActive=true)
- Position must be external (external=true)

Returns:
- 200: Position details (id, title, description, fileUrl, createdAt)
- 404: Position not found or not available

Used by external candidates to view full job description before applying.

Get ALL applicants without any filters. ADMIN only.

Returns complete list of all applicants from all positions with all statuses, enriched with position titles.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, invited, rejected

request.description:
Get all applicants filtered by status only (across all positions). ADMIN only.

Valid status values:
- pending: Applications awaiting review
- invited: Applicant has been invited to assessment
- rejected: Rejected applications

Returns list of applicants from all positions with the specified status, enriched with position titles.

Get all applicants for a specific position (all statuses). ADMIN only.

Returns list of all applicants who applied to the specified position, regardless of status, enriched with position title.

item.name: Get All Applicants (Search by Name, Email, or Position)

query.description: Search in name, email, or position title (case-insensitive partial match)

request.description:
Search applicants by name, email, or position title. ADMIN only.

The search parameter performs a case-insensitive partial match across multiple fields:
- Applicant name (e.g., search=john matches "John Doe")
- Applicant email (e.g., search=gmail matches "candidate@gmail.com")
- Position title (e.g., search=developer matches "Senior Developer")

Returns list of applicants where any of these fields contains the search term.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, invited, rejected
Search in name, email, or position title (case-insensitive)

request.description:
Get applicants with all filters combined (status + position + search). ADMIN only.

All filters work together:
- status: Filter by application status (pending, invited, rejected)
- positionId: Filter by specific position
- search: Search in applicant name, email, or position title (case-insensitive partial match)

Example: Find all pending applicants whose name, email, or position contains 'developer'.

Get detailed information about a specific applicant. ADMIN only.

Returns:
- 200: Applicant details with position title
- 404: Applicant not found
- 500: Internal server error

Update applicant status (pending, invited, rejected). ADMIN only.

Valid statuses:
- pending: Initial status, awaiting review
- invited: Applicant has been invited to assessment
- rejected: Admin rejected the application

Optional fields:
- statusNote: Internal note tied to the current status. For rejections, this appears in the Google Chat notification but is NOT sent to the candidate. Cleared if omitted on next status update.

The system automatically records:
- reviewedBy: ID of the admin who changed the status
- reviewedAt: Timestamp of the status change
- updatedAt: Timestamp of the update

Returns:
- 200: Status updated successfully
- 400: Invalid status value or applicant not found
- 500: Internal server error

item.description: Endpoints for managing external candidate applications. Public endpoint for candidates to apply, ADMIN endpoints to manage applications.

item.name: Privacy & GDPR

request.description:
Request data erasure (GDPR Right to be Forgotten). Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Process:
1. User submits email and captcha token
2. System validates captcha
3. If applicant data exists, sends verification email with token
4. User must click verification link to confirm deletion

Request Body:
- email: Email address of the applicant
- captchaToken: reCAPTCHA v3 token (action: 'delete_data')

Returns:
- 200: Verification email sent (or generic message if no data found)
- 400: Invalid captcha or validation error

Note: For security, always returns success message even if email not found.

Confirm data erasure using verification token. Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Process:
1. User clicks verification link from email (contains token)
2. System validates token (expires after 24 hours)
3. Anonymizes all applicant records for that email
4. Sends confirmation email

Path Parameter:
- token: Verification token from email link

Returns:
- 200: Data successfully anonymized with count of records processed
- 400: Invalid/expired token, no data found, or already anonymized

Note: Anonymization replaces personal data with generic values and marks status as ANONYMIZED.

Request data export (GDPR Right to Data Portability). Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Process:
1. User submits email and captcha token
2. System validates captcha
3. If applicant data exists, sends email with download link
4. User must click download link to get data

Request Body:
- email: Email address of the applicant
- captchaToken: reCAPTCHA v3 token (action: 'download_data')

Returns:
- 200: Download link sent (or generic message if no data found)
- 400: Invalid captcha or validation error

Note: For security, always returns success message even if email not found.

Download data export using verification token. Public endpoint - no authentication required.

Process:
1. User clicks download link from email (contains token)
2. System validates token (expires after 24 hours)
3. Returns JSON file with all applicant data

Path Parameter:
- token: Verification token from email link

Returns:
- 200: JSON file download (Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="my_data_YYYY-MM-DD.json")
- 400: Invalid or expired token
- 410: Data has been deleted/anonymized and is no longer available

Note: Cannot download data that has been anonymized.

item.description:
GDPR compliance endpoints for data privacy. Public endpoints (no authentication required) that allow applicants to:
- Request data erasure (Right to be Forgotten)
- Request data export (Right to Data Portability)

All requests require reCAPTCHA validation and email verification via token.

request.description: Spring Boot actuator health check endpoint.
